files.notes: This file contains two distinct sections: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman (pages 145-150) and 'Guide Lessons for May' (pages 151-156). The Guide Lessons section contains multiple lessons (Theology, Work and Business, Literature, Social Service) and a Teachers' Topic, all under the main Guide Lessons heading.
